response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer with 15+ years of full-stack work, but C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago. Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/AI tooling rather than the high-performance C++, industrial automation, and IEC 62443 secure-engineering focus this role demands. Core domain requirements (MQTT, industrial protocols, SDL/IEC 62443, Azure, IoT) are not evidenced.
strengths: Strong overall engineering tenure (15+ years) and breadth across backend, embedded, and distributed systems
Demonstrated low-latency, multi-threaded, async I/O experience via DLang work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Solid software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and architectural ownership
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++/STL experience; no recent production C++ delivery
No evidence of IEC 62443, SDL practices, industrial cybersecurity, or MQTT/industrial protocols
No industrial automation, IoT, or Azure cloud background relevant to the target domain

key_factors.factor: Strong senior-level engineering breadth and longevity
